title: Domestic safety screening documentation
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation

investigations.text: Supports listening, documenting needs and concerns, validating, assessing safety and recording support discussed without asserting abuse or imposing action.
investigations.rationale: Supports survivor-centred first-line support and needs context for domestic safety screening; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports listening, documenting needs and concerns, validating, assessing safety and recording support discussed without asserting abuse or imposing action.

source.title: Health care for women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence: a clinical handbook

investigations.text: Supports asking permission to document and recording complaints, symptoms, signs, injuries and relevant history in the person’s words without interpretation.
investigations.rationale: Supports careful partner-violence documentation for domestic safety screening; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports asking permission to document and recording complaints, symptoms, signs, injuries and relevant history in the person’s words without interpretation.

source.title: Health care for women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence: a clinical handbook

investigations.text: Supports recording clinician suspicion, confidential disclosure opportunity and direct enquiry only when clinically indicated; it does not support universal screening.
investigations.rationale: Supports recognition and clinician-entered concern context for domestic safety screening; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports recording clinician suspicion, confidential disclosure opportunity and direct enquiry only when clinically indicated; it does not support universal screening.

exact_section.heading: Summary and Recognition of Domestic Abuse

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Privacy, consent, exact questions, response, immediate danger, children, injuries, support needs, documentation, safety actions and referrals remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for domestic safety screening.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
